diaries.text:
**Aura Kai** (air/philosopher) — Year 23

The air in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Aura Kai, philosopher*

**Grove Ash** (earth/farmer) — Year 23

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Grove Ash, farmer*

**Iron Mar** (fire/scholar) — Year 23

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Iron Mar, scholar*
